topic: Saffron and depression — Nobel Prize-level potential
caption: Did you know saffron has been shown to have a significant impact on depression? 🌟 Studies have found that saffron extract can increase serotonin levels by up to 30% 💡. But how does it work? And what does this mean for the future of mental health treatment? 🤔 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖🌿👍 #saffron #depression #mentalhealth #nobelprize
